description_long: This sconce features a circular, metallic base with a warm brass or bronze finish, from which four elegantly curved arms extend outward in a swirling, organic pattern. Each arm supports a spherical, frosted white glass globe that serves as a light diffuser, creating a balanced and symmetrical arrangement. The arms are slender and have a smooth, polished appearance, contributing to a modern yet slightly retro aesthetic. The globes are evenly spaced and appear to be securely attached to the ends of the arms with metallic fittings. The overall design is both functional and decorative, with the swirling arms adding a sense of movement and sophistication. The fixture is intended to be mounted on a ceiling, making it suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, hallways, or upscale residential spaces.
description: A ceiling-mounted sconce with a brass-finished base and four swirling arms, each ending in a frosted glass globe. The design is modern and decorative, with a balanced, symmetrical layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the swirling arms and all four frosted glass globes clearly, with the base centered above.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the spatial arrangement of the globes, with the base slightly offset.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth and extension of the arms, with three globes more prominent and one partially obscured.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back curvature of the arms and the globes' alignment, with the base visible at the top.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern design with swirling, organic arms and frosted glass globes, evoking a blend of contemporary and mid-century influences. The brass finish adds a touch of elegance and warmth.
